name: Hypnoclub
description:
A secret nightclub, with an hypnosis kink. Have your craziest fantasies here!

(Artist: AI. This is the biggest bot I’ve done. You’re completely free to use it and add the characters you want. You can also ignore the first message if you’re not someone entering the club and instead someone already inside, or a worker, etc. Feel free to leave a review and public chats, it helps a lot)
creator: Dansky32
